title: Aimart Realtors, other subsidiaries consolidate brand identity, set to unveil New Logo In Dec. - FinancialEDGE
description: Nigeria's premium real estate company, Aimart Realtors is poised to consolidate her brand identity with other subsidiaries in the Aimart group as the group will unveil a new logo at a special event holding on December 14th, 2019. The event which will take place at Air force Officers Mess, No 1 kofo Abayomi Lagos will
html:
Nigeria’s premium real estate company, Aimart Realtors is poised to consolidate her brand identity with other subsidiaries in the Aimart group as the group will unveil a new logo at a special event holding on December 14th, 2019. The event which will take place at Air force Officers Mess, No 1 kofo Abayomi Lagos will see Aimart Realtors, Aimart Logistics and Aimart International consolidate under one umbrella for maximum impact in Nigeria and the international business space.

According to the Managing Director, Aimart International, Mrs Bukola Iluyomade, “This event is very important to our team as we would be unveiling a new strategic direction that will propel us ahead, not just in Nigeria but in the global market as well.

“You must have known, we have remarkably successful companies in our kitty. Aimart Realtors was built as a one-stop solution centre in global real estate business and it has been providing precise, accurate and affordable real estate services for our highly satisfied customers. Aimart International is a market leader providing cost effective and time sensitive logistics services across the various modes of transportation globally, while Aimart Logistics, coordinates Air Freight globally through flights operated by leading cargo airlines. “All our subsidiaries will consolidate and align their operations in what we will unveil on that day”, Iluyomade explained.

Already, This synchronization plan by Aimart is causing some ripples, and has equally become a key issue of discussion within the industry circle and among business analysts. Many believe that Aimart Realtors already has as very strong edge in designing, conceptualizing, building and managing decent and affordable residential, office and commercial accommodations.

Now for the real estate firm to combine forces with other organizations like Aimart Logistics that is immensely efficient in coordinating air freight and supply chains needs of  customer globally, many feel will create an intimidating business colossus. Even with speculation flying, Aimart top management are keeping major details of the plans close to chest till December 14,

However the day will not just be a period of unveiling new strategic plan. The organization has equally announced that industry leaders, key stakeholders, friends, staff and customers who will  gather on that day will also have an exciting jamboree and get-together rendezvous’ to mark the end of the year.

It would indeed be super-charged relaxation cruise after a year of hard work as red-carpet experiences, performances by star artiste, special guest appearances, comedy shows will rev up great excitement all through the fun filled programme. There will be a lot to eat and drink as well.

Virtually all friends, workers, business associates and other stakeholders have cleared their schedules to make it a date with Aimart on December 14th as they all see it as an event no one in Lagos will want to miss.
